issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as subscription handling or advanced middleware patterns.
The skill assumes a Node/TypeScript environment and does not address compatibility with other runtime environments or AI agents that may not support TypeScript.

scenarios.name: Protected mutation with auth middleware
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to inline ctx checks and throw plain Errors; treatment defines protectedProcedure as t.procedure.use(...) that throws TRPCError({code:"UNAUTHORIZED"}) and re-injects ctx.user via next(), then validates input with the exact z.object schema and uses .mutation.

scenarios.name: Cursor pagination with infinite scroll
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often uses offset/page or guesses getNextPageParam; treatment implements the limit+1 trick returning {items,nextCursor} and wires useInfiniteQuery with getNextPageParam:(lastPage)=>lastPage.nextCursor exactly as in the skill.
